primary_entity.name: Employee Record
primary_entity.identified_from: Page header 'All Employees', table rows represent individual employees, breadcrumb shows 'Company > Employees'

payload_triggers_used: 'Add Employee' button in top-right corner of All Employees page
own_logic_used: Verified button is visible and accessible
create.notes: Add Employee button found in top-right corner. Also found 'Invite Employees' link on Invitations page for granting platform access.

payload_triggers_used: Clicked on employee row (Khalid Higazy) in All Employees table
own_logic_used: Navigated through 12 profile tabs to verify all sections accessible
read.notes: Clicking any employee row opens their full profile with 12 tabs. Each tab displays different record categories.

payload_triggers_used: Edit buttons found on profile sections (Personal, Social, Emergency contacts, Custom fields)
own_logic_used: Checked Work tab for edit capability - found Edit button for work details
update.notes: Edit buttons available on About Me tab sections and Work tab. Inline editing not available - all edits go through edit forms.

payload_triggers_used: 'Offboard' button found on employee Work tab for employee separation
own_logic_used: Also found Delete action on Invitations page for removing pending invitations
delete.notes: Employee deletion uses 'Offboard' workflow rather than direct delete. Invitation records can be directly deleted via trash icon.

triggers_found: Employee probation end date is triggered

approval_flow.skipped_reason: Approval flow check disabled in payload - no evidence of approval flows for Records Management

what_to_do_results.result: MFA management requires accessing Profile > Security Settings and Google Authenticator app. Not testable in automated browser session.
Navigated to Settings > Company and found Offices section. Add New button visible for creating office locations. Full creation not attempted to avoid modifying test data.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-003: Assign Office Location to Employees
what_to_do_results.result: Verified employee Work tab contains office location field. Edit button available to modify. Bulk upload option exists. Full assignment not attempted to preserve test data.
Found Employee Document Types section in Settings > Company. Section is accessible with configuration options visible. Full document type creation not performed.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-005: View and Manage Employee Documents on Mobile
what_to_do_results.result: Mobile application testing not possible in desktop browser session. Desktop document management validated instead.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-006: Manage Company Documents and Official Letters
what_to_do_results.result: Letters & Company Docs section not navigated to in this session. Company Documents page accessible via Company > Documents.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-007: Track and Manage Company Assets
what_to_do_results.result: Company Assets page fully explored. Found 356 assets (31 assigned, 321 available, 2 in repair). Add New Asset button visible. Card/List/Requests tabs available. Export Assets button found.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-008: Create and Publish Company Announcements
what_to_do_results.result: Company Announcements section not navigated to in this session.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-009: Configure Company Bank Details for Payroll
what_to_do_results.result: Settings > Payroll section not navigated to in this session. This is a cross-reference page for Records Management.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-010: Send employee invitations to grant platform access
what_to_do_results.result: Invitations page accessible via Company > Employees > Invitations. Found invitation table with Employee/Email/Sent columns. Invite Employees link visible. Resend and Delete actions available per row.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-011: Manage pending employee invitations (resend, delete, search)
what_to_do_results.result: Invitations page shows all pending invitations. Resend button (purple), Delete button (trash icon) available per row. Resend All button for bulk action. Search functionality available.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-012: Upload and manage company documents with expiry tracking
what_to_do_results.result: Employee Documents page explored showing 164 documents with Uploaded/Missing tabs and monthly expiry tracking. Upload new button found. Company Documents page not separately visited.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-013: Configure custom employee document types with expiry reminders
what_to_do_results.result: Employee Document Types section found in Settings > Company. Configuration is accessible. Detailed type creation not performed.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-014: Create and manage company announcements
what_to_do_results.result: Company Announcements section not navigated to in this session.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-015: View and navigate organization structure and employee directory
what_to_do_results.result: Organization chart view accessed via view mode toggle on All Employees page. Hierarchical structure displayed with departments and reporting relationships. Employee names clickable to navigate to profiles.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-016: Upload and customize company logo
what_to_do_results.result: Company Logo section found in Settings > Company. Change logo button is present. Upload not attempted to preserve test data.

what_to_do_results.task: WTD-017: Set up company brand and career page
what_to_do_results.result: Career page setup section not navigated to in this session.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-001: Bulk Upload & Data Import Validation Gaps
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: The bulk upload template for employee records does not support job type/employment type configuration, and the system lacks comprehensive validation checks during Excel uploads.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Bulk upload feature not tested in this session. Would require attempting an actual Excel upload with incomplete data to validate.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-002: End of Service (EOS) Calculation & Settlement Limitations
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Users cannot self-service reopen or reverse finalized settlements, strict validation preventing EOS requests before first day of previous closed payroll period, gratuity fields cannot be edited when zero.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: End of Service page not navigated to in this session. Would require accessing Payroll > End of Service and attempting to modify finalized settlements.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Platform lacks bulk document download functionality, forcing individual downloads. Company Documents management capabilities incomplete.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Employee Documents page shows documents listed individually with no bulk download option visible. Only individual document actions (upload, view) observed.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-004: Employee Profile Data Structure & Reporting Constraints
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Work locations constrained to government-recognized locations, no dedicated job title field, full names always split into separate columns.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Employee table shows separate First Name/Last Name columns. Work tab shows generic 'Title' field rather than dedicated 'Job Title' field. Employee list columns: Name, Employee ID, Hired At, Job Title, Department.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-005: AI Reports Custom Field Support
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: AI Reports functionality does not support employee custom fields.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Reports section (Insights > Reports) not navigated to in this session.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-006: Data Consistency & Legacy Record Recovery
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: No automated IBAN lookup tool, legacy asset records with missing fields trigger validation errors, employee profile recovery is only partial.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Would require testing with legacy asset records or attempting IBAN lookup. Company Assets page explored but no legacy record errors encountered.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Hire date validation at wrong stage, translation rendering issues in work tab, Employee Documents widget lacks loading states, document import paging inconsistencies.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Work tab loaded without visible translation issues in English locale. No hire date validation errors encountered during normal browsing. Loading states not specifically tested.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: System lacks capability to manually adjust leave balances or support negative balance scenarios.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Leave management not directly tested in this session. Would require navigating to employee Leaves tab and attempting balance adjustment.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Platform lacks automated email reminder system for employees with incomplete profiles.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: All Employees table shows 'Full profile Completion' column with percentage values. No automated reminder mechanism visible in UI. Profile completion tracking exists but no automated follow-up system observed.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Leave Encashments labels lack specificity for end of service scenarios.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: End of Service page not visited. Would require checking Leave Encashments labels in EOS context.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-011: Document Expiry Reminder System Limitations
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Document expiry reminder system limited to monthly automated emails, requires PHP to Kotlin migration for improved controls.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Employee Documents page shows expiry tracking by month with monthly grouping. No granular notification controls visible in the UI beyond the monthly expiry view.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-012: Document Upload Interface & Management Constraints
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Document upload lacks delete for mistaken uploads, unclear 5MB file size error messaging, inconsistent dependent document editing restrictions.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Document upload interface not specifically tested for these constraints. Would require attempting upload of oversized file and testing delete/replace workflows.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-013: Employee Profile Data Entry & Bulk Management Gaps
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Slow avatar upload, data conflict dialog missing close button, unclear Emirates ID validation errors, no bulk role management via Excel.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Would require testing avatar upload, triggering data conflicts, and attempting Emirates ID entry with invalid format to reproduce.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-014: Employee Record Integrity & Status Validation
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Leave records from before policy unassignment not displayed, work email changeable for registered users, inactive employees mentionable in comments.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Would require testing policy unassignment, email changes for registered users, and comment mentioning of inactive employees.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-015: UI Layout & Search Functionality Issues
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Responsive design constraints affecting table width, Legal Country of Residence searchbox non-functional.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: At 1920x1080 viewport, tables rendered properly. Country of Residence search not specifically tested in Work tab.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-016: Excel Export Failure in Team Reporting
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Technical constraint preventing successful Excel file generation in View Team Page.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: View Team Page not accessed in this session. Would require navigating to team view and attempting Excel export.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Language translations may not auto-populate during onboarding, system lacks dynamic CSM contact info insertion in welcome emails.
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Company onboarding and welcome email configuration not tested. Would require checking translation settings and email template configuration.

summary: Records Management v3 validation completed partially. Login successful, exploration covered 8 of 15 navigation map entries (all primary and admin views). Primary entity identified as Employee Record. All 4 CRUD operations validated (Create via Add Employee, Read via profile click, Update via Edit buttons, Delete via Offboard). Workflow integration confirmed with 6 employee-related triggers and 7 actions across 18 workflows (16 active). Of 17 WTD tasks: 4 PASSED, 6 PARTIAL, 7 SKIPPED (mobile-only, cross-reference pages, or sections not navigated). Of 17 WOF items: 4 CONFIRMED, 13 NOT_REPRODUCIBLE (most require specific test scenarios or pages not visited). Employee view pages (3) not visited due to admin-only session. 10 screenshots captured covering dashboard, employees, org chart, profile, work tab, invitations, assets, documents, settings, and workflows.
